case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. VS. STEVEN MAWER

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-16-2014 - CONTINUED FOR DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-06-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MUST RE-SERVE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN LEGASPI--COMMUNITY RELATIONS--PUBLIC INFO. OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

RETURNED MAIL: COPY OF REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT BY PLAINTIFF AND ANSWER MAILED JULY 8, 2014. ENVELOPE STAMPED "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD"
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,448.12 FILED BY KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MAWER, STEVEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-16-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

RETURN MAIL ENVELOPE STAMPED "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD." ALSO, THE WORD "MOVED" HANDWRITTEN ON ENVELOPE. AS TO DEFENDANT MAWER, STEVEN
REQUEST BY PLAINTIFF TO DISMISS ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT RENDERED ON JUNE 6, 2014 IS MODIFIED TO REFLECT THAT THE ENTIRE ACTION IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
